title: Crash on transitive WHERE constraint and undefined collation
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, b NVARCHAR(255));
CREATE TABLE t2(b INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, x1 NVARCHAR(255), x2 FLOAT DEFAULT NULL);
CREATE TABLE t3(x2 INT, x3 NVARCHAR(255));
SELECT * FROM t3 INNER JOIN t2 ON t3.x2 = t2.b WHERE t2.x1 = (SELECT a FROM t1 WHERE b = 'Test') AND t3.x2 IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Transitive WHERE constraint with undefined collation
